sanskrit: योगसंन्यस्तकर्माणं ज्ञानसञ्छिन्नसंशयम्। आत्मवन्तं न कर्माणि निबध्नन्ति धनञ्जय॥
transliteration: yoga-sannyasta-karmāṇaṃ jñāna-sañchinna-saṃśayam ātmavantaṃ na karmāṇi nibadhnanti dhanañjaya
literal_meaning: For one who has renounced actions through yoga, whose doubts are severed by knowledge, and who is self-possessed—actions do not bind, O Conqueror of Wealth.
contextual_meaning: When action is performed without clinging to outcomes and the inner narrative of doubt is cut by direct self-knowledge, behavior ceases to generate psychological karma; the person is no longer compulsively driven by past imprinting.
psychological_state: Post-therapeutic integration: actions flow from chosen values rather than from conditioned shoulds; rumination stops; sense of self is stable regardless of results.
trigger_scenario: A project manager who used to lose sleep over quarterly targets now sets goals, delegates, and sleeps peacefully, knowing her worth is not on the line with each KPI.
anchor_text: Act without clinging, let knowledge end doubt, and no deed will bind you.
